expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: Although the output restates the benchmark focus and lists the three required dimensions, it explicitly says it cannot demonstrate them from evidence: "The bundle does not provide product requirements detailing: Supported export formats... Entry points... Output expectations" and concludes "Not satisfied... the focus area cannot be demonstrated as covered."

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The deliverable is explicitly framed as Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement and references Phase 5b contract artifacts and rubric: title "Phase5b Checkpoint Enforcement (Advisory)", section "What Phase 5b must produce (contract alignment)" listing `checkpoint_audit`, `checkpoint_delta`, and `qa_plan_phase5b`, and summary "Primary phase assessed: Phase 5b".
